title: Demon Eye Phantoms
description: Uses ETF + EMF to replace phantoms with the Demon Eye from Terraria!
body:
[![A button to join vevetable's Discord server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/061b7cfc70a1d7daa274911fd63a32c5b940b95c.png)](https://discord.com/invite/qDpgxvHH5n)

## Description


_Bored of vanilla phantoms? Enjoy a tasteful reference?_

**Then this resource pack is for you!**

This pack replaces phantoms with the Demon Eye from Terraria, including sounds and **42 possible variants**! 
Each eye has **14 possible eye colours** and **3 possible body colours**.


## Variant Spawn Chances


<details>
<summary>Detailed</summary>

![Graph depicting the spawn rates of Demon Eye body and eye colour variants.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4c42082076a32b653c32193852e59825b834e38.png)

</details>



| Eye Colour          | Spawn Chance          |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|
| Blue                | 16% |
| Brown               | 16% |
| Green               | 10% |
| Amber               | 10% |
| Gray                | 10% |
| Yellow              | 6% |
| Pink                | 6% |
| Light Blue          | 4% |
| Turqoise            | 4% |
| Lime                | 4% |
| Orange              | 4% |
| Red                 | 4% |
| Purple              | 4% |
| Cataract            | 2% |

| Body Colour         | Spawn Chance          |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|
| Red                 | 60% |
| Purple              | 20% |
| Green               | 20% |


## Compatabilities


Demon Eye Phantoms must be placed **ABOVE** any pack that modifies the phantom textures or animations, such as **Fresh Animations**, AND any pack that modifies the **Mycelium particle texture** (Same texture as the trail behind default phantom wings). 

If these rules are followed there should be no issues.


<details>
<summary>Note</summary>

All the sounds used are straight from Terraria and some slightly modified versions of those sounds (no AI used whatsoever.)

</details>


[Shout-out to **demonjoeTV** for featuring this pack's **first release** in a video!](https://youtu.be/o_tBeSqrGuc?t=214&si=JY0dAy06R6vViw4X)
